name: GitLab
compose:
name: slashnode-gitlab
services:
  gitlab:
    image: gitlab/gitlab-ce:19.1.1-ce.0
    container_name: gitlab
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG: |
        # Add any other gitlab.rb configuration here, each on its own line
        gitlab_rails['initial_root_password'] = '${secret.APP_PASSWORD}'
        gitlab_rails['gitlab_shell_ssh_port'] = 2424
        nginx['listen_port'] = 8929
        nginx['listen_https'] = false
    volumes:
      - gitlab_data-config:/etc/gitlab
      - gitlab_data-logs:/var/log/gitlab
      - gitlab_data-data:/var/opt/gitlab
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8929:8929
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  gitlab_data-config:
    name: slashnode-gitlab_gitlab_data-config
  gitlab_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-gitlab_gitlab_data-logs
  gitlab_data-data:
    name: slashnode-gitlab_gitlab_data-data
